member.name: M:abcdcode_LOGLIKE_MOD.OnceEffect.GetSaveData
member.summary:
Used for storing persistent information to save file.
It is recommended to start the method like so: SaveData data = base.GetSaveData();
As base.GetSaveData contains the TypeName of the effect,
which is necessary for loading the effect from a save file.
Consumables also store their respective number of stacks to disk.

member.summary: The Camera used internally by the SnapshotCamera.

member.summary: The layer on which the SnapshotCamera takes snapshots.

member.summary: The default position offset applied to objects when none is specified.

member.summary: The default rotation applied to objects when none is specified.

member.summary: The default scale applied to objects when none is specified.

member.summary: Factory method which sets up and configures a new SnapshotCamera, then returns it.
member.param: The name of the layer on which to take snapshots.
The name that will be given to the new GameObject the SnapshotCamera will be attached to.
member.returns: A new SnapshotCamera, ready for use.

member.summary: Factory method which sets up and configures a new SnapshotCamera, then returns it.
member.param: The layer number of the layer on which to take snapshots.
The name that will be given to the new GameObject the SnapshotCamera will be attached to.
member.returns: A new SnapshotCamera, ready for use.

member.summary: Sanitizes a filename string by replacing illegal characters with underscores.
member.param: The unsanitized filename string.
member.returns: A sanitized filename string with illegal characters replaced with underscores.

member.name: M:abcdcode_LOGLIKE_MOD.SnapshotCamera.SavePNG(System.Byte[],System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Saves a byte array of PNG data as a PNG file.
member.param: The PNG data to write to a file.
The name of the file. This will be the current timestamp if not specified.
The directory in which to save the file. This will be the game/Snapshots directory if not specified.

member.summary: Saves a Texture2D as a PNG file.

The name of the file. This will be the current timestamp if not specified.
The directory in which to save the file. This will be the game/Snapshots directory if not specified.
member.returns: A FileInfo pointing to the created PNG file

member.name: T:abcdcode_LOGLIKE_MOD.SnapshotCamera.GameObjectStateSnapshot
member.summary: This stores the a state (layers, position, rotation, and scale) of a GameObject, and provides a method to restore it.

member.name: M:abcdcode_LOGLIKE_MOD.SnapshotCamera.GameObjectStateSnapshot.#ctor(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Store the current state (layers, position, rotation, and scale) of a GameObject
member.param: The GameObject whose state to store.

member.name: M:abcdcode_LOGLIKE_MOD.SnapshotCamera.GameObjectStateSnapshot.Restore
member.summary: Restore the gameObject to the state stored in this GameObjectStateSnapshot.

member.name: M:abcdcode_LOGLIKE_MOD.SnapshotCamera.SetLayersRecursively(UnityEngine.GameObject)
member.summary: Set the layers of the GameObject and all its children to the SnapshotCamera's snapshot layer so the SnapshotCamera can see it.
member.param: The GameObject apply the layer modifications to.

member.name: M:abcdcode_LOGLIKE_MOD.SnapshotCamera.PrepareObject(UnityEngine.GameObject,UnityEngine.Vector3,UnityEngine.Quaternion,UnityEngine.Vector3)
member.summary: Prepares an instantiated GameObject for taking a snapshot by setting its layers and applying the specified position offset, rotation, and scale to it.
member.param: The instantiated GameObject to prepare.
The position offset relative to the SnapshotCamera to apply to the gameObject.
The rotation to apply to the gameObject.
The scale to apply to the gameObject.
member.returns: A GameObjectStateSnapshot containing the state of the gameObject prior to modifying its layers, position, rotation, and scale.

member.name: M:abcdcode_LOGLIKE_MOD.SnapshotCamera.PreparePrefab(UnityEngine.GameObject,UnityEngine.Vector3,UnityEngine.Quaternion,UnityEngine.Vector3)
member.summary: Prepares a prefab for taking a snapshot by creating an instance, setting its layers and applying the specified position offset, rotation, and scale to it.
member.param: The prefab to prepare.
The position offset relative to the SnapshotCamera to apply to the prefab.
The rotation to apply to the prefab.
The scale to apply to the prefab.
member.returns: A prefab instance ready for taking a snapshot.

member.name: M:abcdcode_LOGLIKE_MOD.SnapshotCamera.TakeObjectSnapshot(UnityEngine.GameObject,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Takes a snapshot of an instantiated GameObject and returns it as a Texture2D.
Uses a completely transparent background and applies the default position offset, rotation and scale to the gameObject while taking the snapshot, and restores them afterwards.
member.param: The instantiated GameObject to snapshot.
The width of the snapshot image.
The height of the snapshot image.
member.returns: A Texture2D containing the captured snapshot.

member.name: M:abcdcode_LOGLIKE_MOD.SnapshotCamera.TakeObjectSnapshot(UnityEngine.GameObject,UnityEngine.Color,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Takes a snapshot of an instantiated GameObject and returns it as a Texture2D.
Applies the default position offset, rotation and scale to the gameObject while taking the snapshot, and restores them afterwards.
member.param: The instantiated GameObject to snapshot.
The background color of the snapshot. Can be transparent.
The width of the snapshot image.
The height of the snapshot image.
member.returns: A Texture2D containing the captured snapshot.

The scale that will be applied to the gameObject while taking the snapshot. Its scale will be restored after taking the snapshot.
The width of the snapshot image.
The height of the snapshot image.
member.returns: A Texture2D containing the captured snapshot.

Initially taken from CWR (with permission from undefined) before being improved upon
by fixing some UI bugs and other unrelated jank and by adding some shortcuts for
storing BattleUnitModels easily.

A containing the spawn method of how the unit was spawned.
Only works with units summoned by . Any other units will return .

member.name: T:RogueLike_Mod_Reborn.ScrollAbilityUtil
member.summary:
This utility was made by StartUp for the Da'at Floor Mod in order to create On Scroll effects.
It has been used with due permission from both StartUp himself and the current coordinator
of the Da'at Floor Mod (at the time of writing, Dememenic).
If you plan on taking this for yourself, please credit StartUp for ScrollAbilityUtil, and keep this summary tag here.
Oh yeah, and as a bonus, you're gonna need to reference UnityEngine.InputLegacyModule besides the regular CoreModule
in order for this to work.
